_rule: The agent changes ONLY the passes field from false to true after real end-to-end verification. It does not add, delete, or edit descriptions.
_source: Generated from TODO.md by /solkova-core:analizer on 2026-07-20. IDs map to TODO.md findings.

features.description: [TEST-001] _registry_roots no-PyYAML fallback is tested: with yaml patched to None, both business home and portfolio roots resolve
steps: python3 -m unittest tests.test_ownership_guard.TestRegistryRoots -v shows a new passing test that sets yaml=None

features.description: [TEST-002] load_ownership() PyYAML-missing path is tested end to end and equals the PyYAML by_path map
steps: python3 -m unittest tests.test_ownership_guard.TestFallbackParser -v shows the load_ownership-without-pyyaml test passing

features.description: [TEST-003] run_checks contains a per-check exception so a malformed ownership.yaml aborts only that check
steps: python3 -m unittest tests.test_validate_package.TestRunChecksContainment -v shows the malformed-ownership test passing with 'check_ownership aborted' in errors

features.description: [TEST-004] check_agent_tools catches WebSearch, NotebookEdit and Task as outbound
steps: python3 -m unittest tests.test_validate_package.TestAgentTools -v shows each of the three tools flagged 'outside world'

features.description: [TEST-005] A symlink from outside the workspace to an owned file is still denied to a non-owner subagent
steps: python3 -m unittest tests.test_ownership_guard -v shows the symlink test producing a deny naming the real owner

features.description: [BUG-001] check_hooks fails the build when the PreToolUse matcher stops covering apply_patch
steps: Remove apply_patch from hooks.json matcher; python3 scripts/validate_package.py founder-os FAILS
Restore it; validator passes

features.description: [PERF-001] The guard does not import yaml on the main-thread/outbound path
steps: python3 -X importtime founder-os/hooks/ownership-guard.py < a main-thread payload | grep -c yaml returns 0
python3 -m unittest tests.test_ownership_guard stays green

features.description: [PERF-002] workspace_roots and the registry read happen once per hook invocation, not once per path
steps: python3 -m unittest tests.test_ownership_guard green including a multi-path apply_patch fixture; deny/allow decisions unchanged

features.description: [BUG-002] The no-PyYAML owns: fallback parses both deeper-indent and same-indent YAML list styles, and a test pins it against PyYAML on the real ownership.yaml
steps: Reformat owns: to same-indent list; run the guard with PyYAML uninstalled; load_ownership() still returns the map
python3 -m unittest tests.test_ownership_guard green

features.description: [BUG-003] parse_frontmatter accepts CRLF line endings in both scripts
steps: Create a CRLF fixture agent file; parse_frontmatter returns the parsed dict instead of raising
python3 scripts/validate_package.py founder-os and generate_commands --check both pass

features.description: [ARCH-001] CI declares and pins Node, and the behavior test skips gracefully when node is absent
steps: ci.yml contains an actions/setup-node step
On a PATH without node, python3 -m unittest discover -s tests SKIPS the behavior test instead of erroring
README/getting-started list Node as a dev requirement

features.description: [ARCH-002] SYSTEM_SKILLS, STANDALONE_SKILLS and parse_frontmatter live in one shared module imported by both scripts
steps: grep -c 'def parse_frontmatter' scripts/*.py returns 1
python3 scripts/validate_package.py founder-os and generate_commands --check both pass

features.description: [ARCH-003] Agent/skill/cadence counts in docs/index.html, docs/README.md, docs/getting-started.md and the Codex manifest are checked (or generated) so drift fails the build
steps: Add a dummy skill dir; python3 scripts/validate_package.py founder-os fails for every drifted file, not only the root README

features.description: [ARCH-004] Claude and Codex plugin manifests carry one canonical description, and check_plugin validates their agreement
steps: Introduce a description mismatch; python3 scripts/validate_package.py founder-os fails
After sync it passes

features.description: [BUG-004] generate_commands prints a clean FAIL and exit 1 when skills/ is missing
steps: python3 scripts/generate_commands.py /tmp/emptydir prints FAIL: and returns 1 with no traceback

features.description: [A11Y-001] The landing page shares with a proper Open Graph / Twitter card and declares a canonical URL
steps: Facebook Sharing Debugger and Twitter Card Validator render a 1200x630 preview for docs/index.html

features.description: [A11Y-002] All body copy on the orange multi-business section meets WCAG AA (>=4.5:1)
steps: axe color-contrast on docs/index.html reports no violations on the .multi-business copy and .multi-principle span

features.description: [A11Y-003] aria-labels are on elements with naming-capable roles (img/group/figure)
steps: axe aria-prohibited-attr passes on docs/index.html; VoiceOver announces the fictional-example and diagram labels

features.description: [A11Y-004] The 'Browse all 49 workflows' summary shows a visible, unclipped keyboard focus ring
steps: Tab to the catalogue summary; a >=3:1 focus ring is visible on all sides

features.description: [A11Y-005] The page still renders visible content if the main script throws
steps: Inject an error near the top of the IIFE in docs/index.html; all .reveal content still becomes visible

features.description: [PERF-005] The sticky header no longer causes scroll jank from a per-frame backdrop blur
steps: DevTools Performance scroll at 4x CPU throttle shows no long frames attributable to .site-header

features.description: [TEST-006] workspace_roots relative/default FOUNDER_OS_HOME resolution is tested
steps: python3 -m unittest tests.test_ownership_guard -v shows the relative-home test passing

features.description: [TEST-007] _patch_paths is tested for Add/Delete/Update/Move markers and multi-file dedup order
steps: python3 -m unittest tests.test_ownership_guard.TestPatchPaths -v passes

features.description: [TEST-008] agent_type_for negative branches (bad turn_id, no PLUGIN_DATA, missing mapping) each resolve to None under test
steps: python3 -m unittest tests.test_ownership_guard.TestAgentTypeFor -v passes

features.description: [TEST-009] check_ownership catches an unowned portfolio_files entry
steps: python3 -m unittest tests.test_validate_package.TestOwnership -v shows the portfolio_files test passing

features.description: [TEST-010] The landing controllers are unit-tested by requiring an extracted JS module, not by string-slicing and eval-ing HTML
steps: node --test tests/*.behavior.test.js passes without any literal source-line markers
